titleStmt.title: SII 10.110: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 110. (A.R. No. 743 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF SŌMĒŚVARA, JUTTIGA, TANUKU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1063 (1[5th] year of Vishṇuvardhana ?)

summary.p: States that Prōli Pāva, a dancing girl attached to the temple of Vāsukiravi Sōmēśvara of Duttika, made a gift of 50 inupa-yeḍlu for a perpetual lamp in the said temple. The sthānapati, the three hundred sānis and the nibandhakartas are enjoined to see that the gift is properly administered.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē guṇatarkkakhēṁdugaṇitē śrī
ḍuttikasthāyinē dīpaṁ saṁtatavarttisaṁyu
ta madā tsōmēśvarā yōjvalaṁ . Ākalpaṁ
tvadha sōttarāyaṇadinē caṁgābhidhāyā
nsutā prōlāṁbā sakalārtthakalpalatikā
śṛṁggārakallōlinī . svasti sarvvalōkāśraya
śrī viṣṇuvarddhanamahārājula pravarddha
māna vijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 15
nagu nēṁṭi pauṣyamāsa bahulapakṣa
daśamiyu budhavāramunāṁṭi yu
ttarāyaṇanimittamuna ḍuttika
vāsukiravi sōmēśvaramahādēvara
ku nīyūri sāni vritti kattya
yaina mādamakūṁtuṟaina ceṁgama
kūntuṟu prōlipāva peṭṭina yakha
ṇḍavarttidīpamunaku niccina yavi 50
Inupayeḍlu vīniṁ jēkoni ceṁ
giyabōyini koḍku kommanabōyu
ṇḍu nityapaḍi ḍākarēmi naṁdimāni
ka māneṁḍu sēsi neyi vōsi yāca
ṁdrārkkamu naḍapaṁgalavāṇḍu Idharmmu
vu cunaṭṭugā ḍuttikasthānāpatu
lunu sānimunnūṟvuru nibaṁdhakāṟunu
rakṣiṁci naḍapaṁgalavāru
Digital edition of SII 10.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
